description: Realistic balanced payload. 4-5 zones with all 4 execution buckets populated. All top3 lists have 3 items. Delayed total 30-50. Reaudit total 10-20. byRating has 3-4 entries. Different zone/cluster/auditee names across both variations.

Realistic balanced payload. 4-5 zones with all 4 execution buckets populated. All top3 lists have 3 items. Delayed total 30-50. Reaudit total 10-20. byRating has 3-4 entries. Different zone/cluster/auditee names across both variations.
One zone has inProgressPct + lapsedPct exceeding 50% of its total schedules. reauditCount > 0 for at least 2 zones. Tests correct bolding of lapsed and reaudit counts.
All zones have lapsedCount = 0 and lapsedPct = 0.0. reauditCount also = 0 for all zones. Tests that narrator reports zero values explicitly without bolding them.
zoneExecutionOverview.zones[] has exactly 1 zone. All other sections normally populated. Tests single-zone narration for bullet 1.

All schedules in all zones have completedPct = 100%. inProgressCount, lapsedCount, reauditCount all = 0. delayedSchedules.total = 0. reauditSchedules.total = 0. Tests narrator correctly reports all-zero bottleneck and correlation sections.

top3ClustersByDelay = [], top3ClustersByReopening = [], top3AuditeesByDelay = [], top3AuditeesByReopening = [] (all empty — no delays or reopenings). Zones and volume lists are normally populated. Tests absence-sentence narration for bottleneck bullet.
Multiple zones have reauditCount > 5 and reauditPct > 15%. reauditSchedules.total = 40+. byRating for reaudit has 4+ entries. Tests correct bolding of reaudit fields.
top3ClustersByDelay rank-1 cluster has delayedCount > 30 and avgDelayDays > 20. delayedSchedules.total = 80+. Tests rank-1 bold formatting in bullets 2 and 4.

Two zones have identical totalSchedules. Two clusters have identical delayedCount. Top auditee byDelay and byReopening overlap (same auditee appears in both lists). Tests exact label fidelity when values are tied.
